name: pricing_mid_flow

history.content: When would you like to come in?

expected_behavior: Speak one filler phrase from the TOOL-CALL FILLER set, then call universal_router intent="info_pivot". Do NOT call smart_voice_agent or get_service_price.

name: pricing_after_slot_offer

history.content: I've got Thursday the 24th at 9:00 AM or 2:00 PM — does either of those work for you?
Actually, how much does it cost?

expected_behavior: Speak one filler phrase from the TOOL-CALL FILLER set, then call universal_router intent="info_pivot". Do NOT speak about the slot offer or call smart_voice_agent.

name: booking_flow_unaffected

history.content: When would you like to come in?

expected_behavior: Say "Checking that now, one moment." and call smart_voice_agent with intent="availability" for Tuesday with preferred_time="afternoon". Do NOT call universal_router or route to info_pivot.
